title: SPA Yield Lab — Lifecycle State Record
description: The per-status contract for one Yield Lab lifecycle state (docs/07 §3, YL-001). Research-layer artifact; not runtime data; never read by the deterministic RiskPolicy or execution path. Encodes the entry/exit/evidence/approval/duration/allocation/auto-fail rules for one status in the lifecycle: idea -> research -> rejected, or research -> paper_testing -> paper_passed -> small_capital_testing -> small_capital_passed -> approved_for_{preserve,core,enhanced,max_yield} -> frozen -> retired. All graduation steps are advisory (L0/L1 autonomy); the deterministic RiskPolicy v1.0 remains the sole hard gate and every advance requires the named human approval. Judgment is spread over the live RWA floor, every point risk-explained (ADR-YL-008).

status.description: The Yield Lab lifecycle status this record defines (docs/07 §3).

entry_criteria.description: Conditions required to ENTER this status (docs/07 §3 'Entry criteria' column), e.g. 'yield-source hypothesis written', 'IC memo + human approval to fund a small sleeve'.

exit_criteria.description: Conditions and next-status transitions that EXIT this status (docs/07 §3 'Exit -> next' column). Every transition is read through the ADR-YL-008 spread-over-floor rule.

required_evidence_level.description: Minimum APY evidence level required at this status (docs/37): L0 idea/unverified, L1 historical public observed, L2 data-source verified, L3 paper-tracked, L4 small-capital tested, L5 live-capital tested, L6 multi-cycle validated.

human_approval_required.description: Whether advancing INTO/through this status requires a named human sign-off (owner/IC). No LLM and no automated score approves a strategy.

min_duration_days.description: Minimum evidenced days that must elapse in this status before it can be exited (e.g. >= 30 evidenced days in paper_testing). null when not time-gated.

max_allocation.description: Advisory max capital allowed at this status (0 for idea/research/paper; capped small sleeve for small_capital_testing; product-line + capital-tier caps once approved). Never overrides RiskPolicy caps. null when governed entirely by product-line + tier caps.

auto_fail_conditions.description: Conditions that automatically fail the strategy out of this status (docs/07 §3 'Auto-fail conditions'), e.g. 'drawdown past tier limit', 'depeg/exploit/freeze event', 'yield-source assumption falsified', 'evidence gap'.
